message:
test: extract hold_active_lexical_rebuild_lock helper + tidy TUI snapshot format

cli_robot.rs
- Consolidate the fixture setup used by
  state_hides_empty_active_rebuild_pipeline_runtime_before_first_heartbeat
  and the paired runtime-population test into a single
  hold_active_lexical_rebuild_lock(data_dir, db_path, runtime) helper.
- The helper writes .lexical-rebuild-state.json, opens the index
  run-lock with try_lock_exclusive(), and emits the
  pid/started_at_ms/db_path/mode/job_kind/phase metadata block.
- Drops duplicated inline rebuild-state JSON in callers and keeps
  the lock file alive via a returned File handle so the test holds
  exclusive access for the whole assertion window.

tui_flows.rs
- Minor snapshot header reformat (FLOW/KEYS/STATE/FINAL_FRAME
  sections) so diffs between captured TUI snapshots are easier to
  scan. Pure cosmetic; no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
